question: How many different cuisines have I learned to cook or tried out in the past few months?

retrieval_results.context:
User attended a vegan cuisine class
User tried a Korean bibimbap recipe from the cooking class's online recipe library and found it amazing.
User learned to make vegan lasagna with a cashew-based ricotta cheese substitute
User attended a fermentation workshop at a local food co‑op where they learned to make sauerkraut and kimchi.
User plans to try teff flour, will adjust recipe ratios and experiment with different ingredients.
User plans to make a chicken and mixed vegetable stir‑fry this week.
User wants to incorporate fermented foods such as sauerkraut, kimchi, kefir, and miso into their diet.
